_comment: Self-agentification config: this is the agentify project agentified by its own plugin. Per WS-E-002 of epic/PLAN.md. Used by bin/agentify when --output=. (re-render in place) and by /agt-config show / /agt-loop / etc. when invoked from within this repo. Distinct from agentify.config.default.json (which is the plugin-install default seed for new targets).
